notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Framber Valdez, assist to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Alec Burleson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dillon Dingler GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dillon Dingler grounds into a double play, third baseman Ramón Urías to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Kerry Carpenter out at 2nd. Dillon Dingler out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohel Pozo reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Framber Valdez, assist to first baseman Spencer Torkelson. Alec Burleson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: JJ Wetherholt pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt flies out to left fielder Riley Greene.
